# Extracao: transcription_mp4_02-_Course_4__Lesson_1__-_Knowing_Your_Market

- **Fonte:** transcription_mp4_02-_Course_4__Lesson_1__-_Knowing_Your_Market.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Often potential real estate investors talk about how they're holding off on jumping into the market until it even outs or values go down. Look if you remember 2008 housing crisis as well as I remember it you'd also remember the panic and the chaos that seemed to impact everyone from buyers, sellers and lenders in the real estate industry on all sides. People were like, oh I'm gonna go buy when things are terrible. They didn't buy anything because you couldn't you couldn't sell a property. No one would give you a fair price. You couldn't buy a property because you couldn't get debt on it. While it's easier said than done, you need to shake off all these pre-existing concerns and fears of buying low, selling high, finding the perfect spot in the market to sell, to buy or sell. Look the market will go up. The market also will go down. Regardless there's always a place for you in the cycle as long as you know the market. No matter where it sits at this moment in time or moments that follow there's a place in the cycle where a great purchase can be made.
